twocolconflict: Isku dhaca wax ka beddelka ee ku salaysan cutubyo
twocolconflict-desc: Muuji shaashad isku dhafid wax ka beddel ah oo dhinac dhinac ah si loo xalliyo isku dhaca wax ka beddelka
twocolconflict-beta-feature-message: Isku dhaca wax ka beddelka ee ku salaysan cutubyo
twocolconflict-beta-feature-description: Muuji aragtida isku dhaca wax ka beddelka adigoo adeegsanaya aragti horumarsan oo ku salaysan cutubyo.
twocolconflict-copy-action: Nuqul ka samee qoraalka oo dhan
twocolconflict-copy-notice: Qoraalka buuxa ee wikitext wax ka beddelkaaga waa la nuqulay (isbeddellada hoos lagu sameeyay kuma jiraan).
twocolconflict-copy-tab-tooltip: Eeg wikitext buuxa ee wax ka beddelkaaga (isbeddellada hoos lagu sameeyay kuma jiraan). Waxay ku furmaysaa tab cusub.
twocolconflict-copy-tooltip: Nuqul ka samee wikitext buuxa ee wax ka beddelkaaga oo geli sabuurada (isbeddellada hoos lagu sameeyay kuma jiraan)
twocolconflict-core-ui-hint: Is dhexgal cusub oo lagu xalliyo isku dhacyada wax ka beddelka ayaa hadda la heli karaa. Daar “Isku dhaca wax ka beddelka ee ku salaysan cutubyo” ee [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-editing|dooqyadaada]] si aad u tijaabiso.
twocolconflict-special-footer-hint: Xir boggan hadda si aad ugu noqoto is dhexgalka isku dhaca wax ka beddelka.
twocolconflict-special-header-overview: Intii aad wax ka beddelka ku jirtay, isticmaale kale ayaa isla boggaas wax ka beddelay oo daabacay ka hor adiga. Nuqul keliya oo la daawan karo oo wax ka beddelkaaga ah ayaa hoos lagu kaydiyay. Isbeddellada lagu sameeyay is dhexgalka isku dhaca wax ka beddelka lama muujinayo halkan. Si aad isbeddellada u mideyso oo aad u xalliso dhibaatada adigoo adeegsanaya is dhexgalka, ku noqo tab-kii hore.
twocolconflict-special-textarea-hint: Waxaad eegi kartaa oo nuqul ka samayn kartaa isha ee wax ka beddelkaaga:
twocolconflict-special-malformed-title: Cinwaan maqan ama aan sax ahayn.
twocolconflict-special-expired: Waxba halkan lagama helayo. Tani waxay u badan tahay inay ka dhigan tahay inaad hore ula kulantay isku dhac wax ka beddel, laakiin waqtigaas waa la dhaafay qoraalkii si ku meelgaar ah loo kaydiyeyna wuu dhacay.
twocolconflict-split-header-hint: Waxaad gacan ka geysan kartaa horumarinta sifadan haddii aad ka tagto faallo ku saabsan [//www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help_talk:Paragraph-based_Edit_Conflict_Interface bogga wadahadalka ee mashruuca].
twocolconflict-split-header-hint-beta: Waad ku mahadsan tahay isticmaalka sifadan beta ah. Waxaad gacan ka geysan kartaa horumarinteeda haddii aad ka tagto faallo ku saabsan [//www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help_talk:Paragraph-based_Edit_Conflict_Interface bogga wadahadalka ee mashruuca].
twocolconflict-split-header-overview: Intii aad wax ka beddelka ku jirtay, isticmaale kale ayaa isla boggaas wax ka beddelay oo daabacay ka hor adiga. Fadlan dib u eeg labada nooc oo midee. Kaliya qoraalka ku jira sanduuqyada la xushay ayaa la keydin doonaa marka aad gujiso "{{int:publishchanges}}".
twocolconflict-split-current-version-hea: Nuqulkii ugu dambeeyay ee wax ka beddelka sida uu ahaa $1
twocolconflict-split-tour-dialog-dot-mes: Si aad u hesho talooyin waxtar leh, guji dhibcaha buluugga ah ee ifaya.
twocolconflict-split-tour-dialog-message:
Nasiib darro, intii aad wax ka beddelka ku jirtay, isticmaale kale ayaa sidoo kale isla boggaas wax ka beddelay oo daabacay ka hor adiga.

Ha welwelin, isbeddelladaada ma lumin! Fadlan dib u eeg labada nooc oo midee. Haddii loo baahdo, waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa qoraalka la xushay. Kaliya qoraalka ku jira sanduuqyada la xushay ayaa la keydin doonaa marka aad gujiso "{{int:publishchanges}}."
twocolconflict-split-tour-popup1-header: Isbeddellada kala fogaaday waxaa loo muujinayaa saf-saf ahaan.
twocolconflict-split-tour-popup1-message:
Marka ay farqi u dhexeeyo qoraalka isticmaalaha kale iyo kanaga, labada nooc waxaa lagu muujinayaa dhinac-dhinac: nooca isticmaalaha kale oo ku jira sanduuqa huruudda ah ee bidix, iyo kanaga oo ku jira sanduuqa buluugga ah ee midig.

Marka aysan jirin farqi u dhexeeya labada nooc, safafka waxaa lagu muujinayaa sanduuqyo cawl ah. Kuwaas waa la furi karaa ama la xiri karaa, sidoo kale waa la tafatiri karaa haddii loo baahdo.
twocolconflict-split-tour-popup2-header: Dooro isbeddellada aad rabto inaad sii hayso
twocolconflict-split-tour-popup2-message:
Dooro nooca qoraalka aad rabto inaad sii hayso adigoo gujinaya mid ka mid ah labada badhan ee u dhexeeya laba saf kasta. Marka aad doorato nooc, waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa adigoo gujinaya astaanta qalinka. Sidoo kale waa suurtogal inaad ka nuqul ka samayso qoraalka nooca aanad dooran adigoo isticmaalaya nuqul iyo dhaji kiiboodhka ama guuji midig.

Waa inaad doorataa hal nooc saf kasta oo isbeddel leh si loo kaydiyo qoraalka la mideeyay.
twocolconflict-split-tour-popup3-message: Qoraalka la beddelay ee labada nooc ee safka waa la iftiimiyay. Marka aad wax ka beddesho qoraalka, iftiimintu way baaba’aysaa.
twocolconflict-split-edit-tooltip: Guji si aad u tafatirto qoraalkan
twocolconflict-split-reset-warning: Iska tuur isbeddellada? Qoraalka sanduuqan waxa lagu soo celin doonaa sidii uu ahaa markii isku dhaca wax ka beddelku dhacay.
twocolconflict-split-select-all-other-to: Guji si aad u doorato dhammaan isbeddellada nooca kale
twocolconflict-split-select-all-your-too: Guji si aad u doorato dhammaan isbeddellada wax ka beddelkaaga
twocolconflict-split-selected-all-other-: Dhammaan isbeddellada nooca kale ayaa la doortay
twocolconflict-split-selected-all-your-t: Dhammaan isbeddellada wax ka beddelkaaga ayaa la doortay
twocolconflict-split-select-other-toolti: Guji si aad u doorato nooca kale
twocolconflict-split-select-your-tooltip: Guji si aad u doorato noocaaga
twocolconflict-split-tour-dialog-message: Nasiib darro, qof kale ayaa isla waqtigaas wax soo dhigay. Fadlan dib u eeg faallooyinka bogga xiga. Haddii loo baahdo, waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa kaaga oo beddeli kartaa nidaamka ugu dambeeya.
twocolconflict-talk-header-overview: Qof kale ayaa isla waqtigaas wax soo dhigay. Fadlan dib u eeg faallooyinka hoose oo dooro nidaamka loo daabacayo. Haddii loo baahdo, waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa qoraalkaaga.
twocolconflict-talk-reorder-prompt: Dhig faalladaada marka loo eego faallada is khilaafsan:
